author: Corsin Alig, Bernd Huf, Stephan Gieriet
description: The ASWStandard library is a utility library, comprising two sub-libraries: ASWGlobal, which defines commonly used constants (booleans, dialog return codes, timer values) for use across Hamilton SMT and MED applications, and TraceLevel, which provides a configurable tracing/logging framework with multiple verbosity levels (None, Release, Debug) and functions for tracing variables, arrays, sequences, and action states - enabling developers to embed structured diagnostic output into their liquid-handling instrument methods.
